name: Jamie Cullum
abstract: Jamie Paul Joseph Cullum (born 20 August 1979) is an English jazz-pop singer, pianist, songwriter and radio presenter. Although primarily a vocalist and pianist, he also accompanies himself on other instruments, including guitar and drums.

concerts.label: Jamie Cullum, Singer-Songwriter
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: George Wein
about_quotes.evidence: You've got a big commercial name, you got, like a Jamie Cullum or a Chris Boti or something like that
about_quotes.doc_title: George Wein — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
